steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage states that the Beirut Stock Exchange's focus on local businesses “benefits investors and the local economy.” This positive outcome reveals what the blank must represent.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Thrive” means to prosper and succeed—exactly what would make local businesses valuable to investors and the local economy. Ebb (decline), disperse (scatter), and overspend (excessive spending) contradict this positive outcome. That matches choice A — A is correct.
